title: Midnight Zest Lamb
description: A diabetic-friendly and crunchy Saudi Arabian dish featuring lamb shanks with a tangy yet savory flavor profile.
instructions: Mix together lamb shanks, kosher salt, cumin seeds, coriander seeds, ground cayenne pepper in a large bowl. Marinate for at least 2 hours.
Heat coconut oil and olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add lamb shanks and cook until browned on all sides, about 8 minutes.
Add unsulped blackberry vinegar and apple cider vinegar; stir well. Bring to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and let it simmer gently for about 1 hour per pound of meat.
Increase heat to medium and cook, basting with accumulated juices, until lamb is tender, about 30 minutes more.
Stir in chopped cilantro and crushed red pepper flakes. Taste and adjust seasonings if needed. Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.
